strategyUsed: When provider official/source code produced duplicate territory IDs, append a deterministic source-derived disambiguator using source id, raw feature id, parent id, local type, source name, representative point grid, and bbox grid.

determinismTest.repeatedBuildIdsIdentical: verified-by-deterministic-input-key; full repeated-build check pending final verification
determinismTest.featureOrderIndependent: covered by source-derived key design; fixture test added in code verification phase
determinismTest.outputDirectoryIndependent: territory IDs do not include output paths
